title: Transform-and-Conquer Strategy Flowchart
description: A visual breakdown of the three main approaches in the transform-and-conquer algorithm design paradigm, showing how a problem instance is transformed into a more convenient form before being solved.
relationships: Instance Simplification transforms Original Problem Instance into Transformed Instance
Problem Reduction solves Transformed Instance to get Solution to Transformed Instance
Representation Change converts Solution to Transformed Instance back to Solution to Original Instance
